title: UFO over Zimbabwe in summer 2008 had CIA on ‘high alert,’ new files reveal
description: The CIA placed its assets in Zimbabwe on high alert in the summer of 2008 after a UFO was seen hovering over the Harare airport in 2008.

title: Mystery potato hovering over Colorado is reported in latest UFO files
description: The object, which appeared to change shape and move, was sighted in early 2022.
